name: Tasso
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds Lean pork butt; cut into 1-inch thick, 4-5 ounce slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine salt, black pepper, cayenne, paprika, granulated garlic, and onion powder.
2. Dredge each piece of pork in the spice mix.
3. Press the spice mix well into each piece.
4. Pack the tasso into plastic wrap, about 4 pieces per pack.
5. Refrigerate for a minimum of 3 days or up to 1 week.
